effect.name: Aliasing
effect.description:
Aliasing (LADSPA 1407)
Simulates aliasing using nyquist frequency modulation. Produces wacky results if the blocks aren't even numbers of samples long.
effect.author: Steve Harris (http://www.ladspa.org)

parameter.name: Aliasing Level
parameter.comment: Controls the amount of simulated aliasing in the output.
